# Configuration Reference

## Environment Variables

All settings have sensible defaults and can be overridden per environment.

| Variable | Type | Default | Description |
|----------|------|---------|-------------|
| `IIL_ENRICHMENT_TIMEOUT` | float | `15` | HTTP timeout in seconds |
| `IIL_ENRICHMENT_MAX_RETRIES` | int | `3` | Max retry attempts per request |
| `IIL_ENRICHMENT_BACKOFF_INITIAL` | float | `0.5` | Initial backoff in seconds |
| `IIL_ENRICHMENT_BACKOFF_MAX` | float | `8.0` | Maximum backoff in seconds |
| `IIL_ENRICHMENT_CACHE` | bool | `1` | Enable HTTP caching (`1`/`0`) |
| `IIL_ENRICHMENT_CACHE_DIR` | path | `.cache/iil-enrichment/` | Cache directory |
| `IIL_ENRICHMENT_RATE_LIMIT` | bool | `1` | Enable rate limiting (`1`/`0`) |
| `IIL_ENRICHMENT_USER_AGENT` | str | `iil-enrichment/0.2 ...` | User-Agent header |
| `GESTIS_API_KEY` | str | (demo key) | DGUV GESTIS API key |

## Installation Extras

| Extra | Dependencies | Use Case |
|-------|-------------|----------|
| `http` | httpx, tenacity, hishel, pyrate-limiter | HTTP providers |
| `django` | Django 5.0+ | Django model integration |
| `gestis` | = `http` | GESTIS provider |
| `pubchem` | = `http` | PubChem provider |
| `pgvector` | pgvector, Django | Vector similarity (Phase 2) |
| `all` | Django + http + pgvector | Everything |
| `dev` | pytest, ruff, respx, pytest-mock | Development |

## Per-Provider Defaults

| Provider | Cache TTL | Rate Limit |
|----------|-----------|------------|
| GESTIS | 7 days | 5 req/s |
| PubChem | 7 days | 5 req/s |

Configured in `enrichment/config.py` via `DEFAULT_TTLS` and `DEFAULT_RATE_LIMITS`.
